label: 第156話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.67
summary_short: 伏黒とパンダは綺羅羅の術式「星間飛行」の規則を分析する。南十字座の星を割り当てる術式だと見抜き、秤のもとへ進む道を作る。
summary_full: 伏黒は脱兎を大量に展開し、星間飛行で接近可能な対象と拒まれる対象を調べる。自分と式神にアクルックス、パンダにイマイ、扉にガクルックスなどの星名が付いていることから、術式が南十字座を基に呪力へ星を割り当て、決められた順序でしか接近できない仕組みだと推測する。綺羅羅の車を利用して順序を逆手に取り、玉犬とともに距離を詰める。伏黒は綺羅羅を拘束し、敵意がないことを伝える。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 恵 and パンダ want to convince 綺羅羅 they're not enemies so that negotiations with 秤 go smoothly. However, 綺羅羅 refuses to believe 恵 and パンダ aren't spies for 呪術高専 , and resists them. In order to bring this scuffle to an end so a real dialogue can begin, 恵 must first navigate a way past 綺羅羅's complex 術式 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 恵's rabbit 式神 marked with an "★Acrux". 恵 uses 脱兎 to summon a large swarm of rabbit 式神 on the roof of the fight club . He notices that each of the rabbits are marked with a symbol saying "★Acrux". None of the rabbits can get near the monitor room, where 恵 notices the symbol "★Gacrux" has been placed on the door. The mass of rabbit 式神 spread all across the roof so 恵 can see where they can and can't approach. 綺羅羅 repels them and wonders what's the point of conjuring up so many rabbits. 綺羅羅's innate 術式 marks 呪力 , registering 式神 the same as sorcerers 綺羅羅 believes 恵 will attract all the rabbits and suffocate, but he suddenly dispels them all. 恵 dispels 脱兎 before the 式神 are attracted back to him. 恵 asks パンダ how 脱兎 was only for his senpai to comment on its cuteness. Annoyed, 恵 clarifies that he meant what areas of the roof did パンダ notice the rabbits could and couldn't approach. パンダ confirms the 式神 were attracted to him and the second floor, but they couldn't reach 綺羅羅 or the monitor room door. パンダ has been marked with the symbol "★Imai" and 恵 has been marked with ★Acrux. 恵 isnt sure what's going on but he knows that 綺羅羅's 術式 is very likely based on a constellation of stars. 綺羅羅 notices that 恵 is getting closer to figuring out how their technique works and puts their attention on him. 恵 makes eye contact with 綺羅羅 and says it might be based on the Southern Cross constellation. 綺羅羅 is surprised that he guessed correctly and 恵 is also surprised that he did. They both gave it away with their reactions, frustrating 綺羅羅. 綺羅羅 now knows 恵 wasn't sure if the 術式's motif was the Southern Cross, but 綺羅羅's reaction confirmed it for him. They know that if 恵 continues to figure out how the technique works then he'll eventually reach the monitor room. 綺羅羅 resolves to hold him off and prevent that no matter what. 恵 correctly guesses that 綺羅羅's technique is based on the Southern Cross constellation. 恵 silently thanks 津美紀 for teaching him about the southern cross but he still doesn't know much about it. He's also confused because the southern cross should have four points. 恵 and パンダ are able to get close to one another and use the opportunity to discuss 綺羅羅's 術式. 恵 initially thought that it assigned them each a point on the southern cross to maintain distance between each point. However, this can't be the case because 綺羅羅 can approach the door and 恵 can approach パンダ. 恵 realizes that it's more likely the 術式 has a determined route where there is a sequential order for who can go near what depending on what point they've been marked with. パンダ considers that the technique doesn't affect the user but 恵 debunks this because 玉犬: 渾 couldn't approach 綺羅羅 earlier. If 綺羅羅 and the door both had stars that repel 恵 and パンダ, then 綺羅羅 could simply flee inside the monitor room. They're staying outside to ensure that 恵 and パンダ don't satisfy the conditions of the technique. 恵 and パンダ surmise this must mean the southern cross has five or more points. If there were only four stars, one of them should be able to approach 綺羅羅. Since that isn't the case, there must be a fifth star between them that they must go through in order to reach 綺羅羅 and the door. " If my secret's out then I'll attack! " パンダ asks what they should do if there are six or seven points but 恵 says five is already too many to make sense for a cross. Knowing that they might be foiled soon, 綺羅羅 goes on the offensive. They ferociously jump on the hood of the car and mark it with ★Imai, sending it up at パンダ. The car flips into パンダ but he barely catches it and assures 恵 he's okay and to go on and search for the other star. While 恵 runs away, パンダ tosses the car away from him. Concerned, 恵 reminds パンダ not to throw the car or else the ★Imai mark will simply attract it back to him. This is exactly what happens, as the car comes right back to パンダ and hits him in the head. 恵 surmises that contact needs to be made by the user to place a star. 綺羅羅 marked 恵 by marking his 呪力 through 玉犬. In order to mark more objects like the monitor room door or the car, they need to be charged beforehand with someone else's 呪力. 恵 focuses on seeing the 呪力 residuals on the car and finds some from someone other than 綺羅羅. Continuing with his theory, 恵 assumes the technique doesn't have a lot more range and looks around for more residuals. He eventually finds a parking stop marked with the fifth star "★Mimosa". 綺羅羅 realizes 玉犬 was never dispelled and that they've been outsmarted by 恵. 恵 quickly touches the parking stop and doesn't notice any more residuals. He knows 綺羅羅's 呪力 is already marked with a star, so he thinks 綺羅羅 can't use their 呪力 to mark another object with ★Acrux and attract more of them to him. However, to 恵's shock, a bunch of objects marked with ★Acrux are already headed straight for him. 綺羅羅's innate 術式 is called 星間飛行 . It marks five stars with a southern cross motif to target 呪力. For one star to approach another, it must follow a determined order, or else one of the targets with the same star will attract it. The order follows the stars from nearest to furthest. Constellations look flat on a diagram, but there is depth in space and each star is a different distance from the Earth. 恵 was marked with ★Acrux, so he must travel through ★Mimosa (parking stop) and ★Ginan (綺羅羅) in order to reach the ★Gacrux (monitor room door). " Please... just listen. " While パンダ is incapacitated, 綺羅羅 admits they're impressed 恵 figured out how 星間飛行 works. That being said, 綺羅羅 believes 恵 was too quick to conclude more objects couldn't be thrown at him. While 綺羅羅 can't mark their 呪力 with more than one star, they can simply remove ★Ginan on their 呪力 and mark other things with ★Acrux instead. Suddenly, 綺羅羅 is the one caught off guard when 玉犬 reappears behind them. 玉犬 quickly immobilizes 綺羅羅, confusing them until they realize that 恵 never dispelled this 式神. 恵 was able to guess which of them with the same star would attract the other and maneuvered so there was a wall between them. He waited until 綺羅羅 was directly between them and then unjammed 玉犬 from the wall so it could take advantage of the fact that 綺羅羅 was now approachable. With 玉犬 taking 綺羅羅 directly to 恵, they're forced to cancel 星間飛行. 恵 restrains 綺羅羅 against the ground with 玉犬 watching over them, but he simply asks for 綺羅羅 to listen to what he has to say.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 伏黒恵 パンダ 星綺羅羅 伏黒津美紀 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: ガチンコファイトクラブ
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 恵 & パンダ vs. 星綺羅羅 (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 星綺羅羅の術式 星間飛行 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬: 渾／脱兎 玉犬: 渾／脱兎

key_events_verified_phase8: 伏黒が脱兎で接近規則を検証する
星間飛行が呪力へ星を割り当てる術式だと見抜く
南十字座の星順を利用して綺羅羅へ近づく
玉犬が綺羅羅の動きを止める
伏黒が綺羅羅を拘束する
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
